title: Add some global options to build
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add some but not all of the Podman global options to the build command.  Need to work out more.  These are the ones that are common with Buildah.  Adds debug logging, root, runroot, storage-driver and storage-opt.

I'll add more in another PR, wanted to get these up as I know folks have been looking for the debug logging.

comments.body: @mheon smoketested keeps failing w/o logs/errors.  Known issue?
@TomSweeneyRedHat It looks like the Cent VMs on Papr are having issues coming up. Not sure why. Probably related to homu not working at all the last few days.
Finally all green for problem child number 2
I'm going to try rh-atomic-bot and see if it's recovered
